economic_notes: GBEs include 1241478 BC LTD, Halalt Corporate Holdings LTD, VIG Projects BC GP LTD, Halalt Shellfish Development Corporation (100% interest), and Halalt Logging Contracting Limited Partnership, VIG Projects BC Limited Partnership (99.9% interest). Cost basis investments include Hul'q'umi'num Fisheries Limited Partnership and BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership.
notes: GBEs accounted for using modified equity method; investment in First Nation business enterprise shown as $4,045,275 on balance sheet (up from $2,563,599). Other income of $3,093,434 is significantly above budget of $3,000,000 and well above prior year $834,314 — possible non-recurring element. Current liabilities include accounts payable $741,685 and current portion of long-term debt $76,092. Ottawa Trust Funds of $59,773 held by Government of Canada. Advances to related entity (HLC General Partner Ltd) $5,200.
